items.title: Hello and welcome
items.summary: An introduction to who i am and what i do.
items.content_text: Hello and welcome to my blog I’m lara now let me tell you a bit about myself. I live and work in the uk, i work for a motorsport team as a software engineer and love every second of it, dont get me wrong it’s hard work but I love it. Away from work I have lots of intrests that keep me occupied I like playing with new software ideas so you will no doubt see this in some of my posts on the site, sometimes this follows over into small electronics projects.I am not all about software I have other intrests like building and flying FPV drones and planes, mountin biking no massive jumps just natrual trails in my local area getting out into nature and just having a good time. This is not all like any girl I love to shop mostly online but ocationaly in person this is something I find dificult as I also have autism and find lots of social situations confusing I am very fortunate to be where I am.Further to the above I like taking photos curently have a big DSLR but it’s a little much for me now so looking to trade down to a decent all in one that fits in my bag and dosen’t weight a ton to lug around. Sorting and organising is also a something I enjoy, I find that quite relaxing most of the time. I couldn’t end without saying I’m also a gamer not a good one but I realy enjoy a good narative in single player games.
items.content_html:
Hello and welcome to my blog I’m lara now let me tell you a bit about myself. I live and work in the uk, i work for a motorsport team as a software engineer and love every second of it, dont get me wrong it’s hard work but I love it. Away from work I have lots of intrests that keep me occupied I like playing with new software ideas so you will no doubt see this in some of my posts on the site, sometimes this follows over into small electronics projects.

I am not all about software I have other intrests like building and flying FPV drones and planes, mountin biking no massive jumps just natrual trails in my local area getting out into nature and just having a good time. This is not all like any girl I love to shop mostly online but ocationaly in person this is something I find dificult as I also have autism and find lots of social situations confusing I am very fortunate to be where I am.

Further to the above I like taking photos curently have a big DSLR but it’s a little much for me now so looking to trade down to a decent all in one that fits in my bag and dosen’t weight a ton to lug around. Sorting and organising is also a something I enjoy, I find that quite relaxing most of the time. I couldn’t end without saying I’m also a gamer not a good one but I realy enjoy a good narative in single player games.
